src/main/java/com/test/ordering/domain/a._comment: Order aggregate has child entity field, addOrderLine and removeOrderLine methods.

src/main/java/com/test/ordering/domain/e._comment: OrderLine child entity has List<String> tags field and correct imports (GAP-AGG-001).

src/main/java/com/test/ordering/applicat._comment: Composition entity gets its own nested ResponseDto. No OrderResponse schema exists in this OpenAPI, so the collection field name falls back to the domain-derived 'orderLines'.
contains: public record OrderLineResponseDto(UUID id, UUID productId, Integer quantity, List<String> tags)

src/main/java/com/test/ordering/applicat._comment: Parent ResponseDto includes the composition collection field before audit fields.
Mapper wires the composition via a dedicated child mapper method.
